name: GRANITE CONSTRUCTION INC
business: Granite Construction Incorporated delivers infrastructure solutions for public and private clients primarily in the United States. It is one of the largest diversified, vertically integrated civil contractors and construction materials producers. The company focuses on infrastructure projects such as streets, roads, highways, bridges, dams, tunnels, and other infrastructure-related projects for public clients, and provides site preparation, mining services, and infrastructure services for private clients.
sellsTo: Private sector commercial and industrial clients

exposures.sentence: We are one of the largest diversified, vertically integrated civil contractors and construction materials producers in the United States.

Within the private sector, we perform various services such as site preparation, mining services and infrastructure services for commercial and industrial sites, railways, residential development, energy development, as well as provide construction management professional services.
the Layne division, which performs water well drilling, rehabilitation services and mineral exploration services.
the Industrial & Energy division, which primarily focuses on commercial solar construction projects
It also provides construction of various complex projects including infrastructure and site development, mining, public safety, tunnel, solar, battery storage and other power-related projects.

Within the private sector, we perform various services such as site preparation, mining services and infrastructure services for commercial and industrial sites, railways, residential development, energy development, as well as provide construction management professional services.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of $3.0 billion unearned revenue in 2026
catalysts.sentence: Approximately $3.0 billion of the December 31, 2025 unearned revenue is expected to be completed during 2026.
